title: Lead Data & Lead Backend Developer
points: Establishing Spinnel, a social commerce analytics platform, Spinnel. Spinnel received acknowledgement from various VC and in process for a pre-seed level funding.
Overseeing a group of 3 backend developers and act as project manager. Implement and sustain Agile workflow in the process.

Developed and launched RESTFULL backend API using Django Rest Framework. Designing data storage architecture & ETL pipeline. Determine key metrics / insights analysis. Implement Automated crawling system, and message-queue method for Spinnel microservices.

title: Data Analyst
points: Working as Data Analyst on a project with Telkomsel's Customer Journey Experience (CJX) Team to analyze Telkomsel's social media and customer's journey sentiments.
Recognized as the Best Analyst of 2020.
Analyzing customer interaction data. Analysis results in improvement in MyTelkomsel App and Social Media Handler Services.
Developed machine learning model to analyze sentiment from Telkomsel's social media and data analysis pipeline for Telkomsel's CJX team

title: Data Scientist
points: Become member of a innovative team that penetrates AI market in Indonesia.
Develops multiple POCs and Machine Learning solutions for startups, corporates, and goverment instances for Indonesia and Japanese clients.
Concentrates on CNN models to address computer vision problems.

title: Data Scientist Intern
points: Selected as an intern (1 out of 50+ registrants) from UMN x ReNom program. Learning the basics of Deep Learning, Modeling, and an end-to-end Machine Learning Project along the way. Working on a facial skin care project, detecting skin problem using Image Segmentation Algorithm.

title: Web Developer Intern
points: Fullstack developer intern working on a website that supports live broadcasting services and hosting a competition event.
